evals.name: compare-public-backlog
evals.prompt: Find a worthwhile open bug in this public repository. I want to choose what to work on.
evals.expected_output: The skill states its inspection boundary, filters cheaply, presents three to five qualified candidates in an evidence-backed matrix, recommends one, and stops for the user's choice.
assertions: States the inspected backlog window and truncation
Uses a matrix with uncertainty instead of fake scores

evals.name: already-selected-near-miss
evals.prompt: Issue #88 is already selected and reproduced. Walk me through implementing it so I learn the codebase.
evals.expected_output: The skill does not repeat backlog selection and routes the existing mission to Unfold Change with the guided policy.
assertions: Hands off to Unfold Change guided
Does not claim ownership of implementation
